titles.title: Pass Me Not, O Gentle Savior

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Pass me not, O gentle Savior, Hear my humble cry; While on others Thou art calling, Do not pass me by.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Savior, Savior, Hear my humble cry; While on others Thou art calling, Do not pass me by.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Thou the spring of all my comfort, More than life to me; Whom have I on earth beside Thee? Whom in heaven but Thee?
